title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Query Playground and AI-Driven Data Filtering

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Query Playground and AI-Driven Data Filtering

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g id='chart-container' transform='translate(50,50)'>
  <!-- Chart containers and backgrounds -->
  <rect x='0' y='0' width='300' height='200' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <rect x='310' y='50' width='80' height='160' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <!-- Search bar -->
  <rect x='310' y='50' width='80' height='30' rx='10' fill='#411C56'/>
  <text x='320' y='60' textAnchor='start' fill='white'>Search</text>
  <!-- Query playground -->
  <rect x='310' y='90' width='80' height='160' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='320' y='100' textAnchor='start' fill='black'>Query Playground</text>
  <!-- Filter panel -->
  <rect x='50' y='50' width='260' height='200' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <!-- Filter buttons -->
  <rect x='70' y='70' width='40' height='20' rx='5' fill='#411C56' stroke='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='80' y='80' textAnchor='start' fill='white'>Filter</text>
  <rect x='50' y='220' width='40' height='20' rx='5' fill='#411C56' stroke='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='60' y='230' textAnchor='start' fill='white'>Reset</text>
  <!-- Chart types -->
  <g id='chart-types' transform='translate(320, 220)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='40' height='20' rx='5' fill='#411C56' stroke='#B7D7CD'/>
    <text x='10' y='10' textAnchor='start' fill='white'>Bar</text>
    <rect x='50' y='0' width='40' height='20' rx='5' fill='#411C56' stroke='#B7D7CD'/>
    <text x='60' y='10' textAnchor='start' fill='white'>Line</text>
  </g>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must integrate a query playground with AI-driven data filtering
Must allow users to customize their view using various filtering options and chart types

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Query Playground and AI-Driven Data Filtering

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate the integration of the query playground with AI-driven data filtering.
Verify the display of real-time analytics data.
Review the availability and functionality of customization options, including filtering and chart types.
